tool_input.command: python -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; data=json.loads(Path('memory/long_term/index.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8')); ii=data.get('item_inverted_index',{}); print('item_index_count', len(data.get('item_index',{}))); print('keyword_count', len(ii)); print('sample_keys:', list(ii.keys())[:80]); print('top_terms:'); [print(k, len(v)) for k,v in sorted(ii.items(), key=lambda kv: len(kv[1]), reverse=True)[:40]]; print('short_or_frag_samples:', [k for k in ii if len(k)<=3][:80])"
